name: Acme Personal Productivity Assistant
idea: Development of a web-based personal productivity assistant. Key features include a scheduling engine, automated reminder system, and a centralized dashboard UI. The project will prioritize a clean user interface for task management and notification handling via the web platform.
guideline: Adhere to the Acme Product Studio values of fast iteration and simple MVP scope using the Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind stack.

timeline.deliverable: Automated notification system and bug fixes

name: Automated Customer Support Chatbot
idea: Development of an automated customer support chatbot focused on intelligent ticket routing. The system will ingest user inquiries, identify intent, and escalate complex issues to human agents via integration with existing support software. Timeline estimate: 8-10 weeks.
guideline: Adhere to the Acme Product Studio values of fast iteration and simple MVP scope. The development must utilize Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind, ensuring the prototype is delivered within the 6-8 week constraint.

timeline.deliverable: Technical architecture document and API integration plan
Chatbot interface and intent identification engine
End-to-end integration with support software and QA report
